pages.text: You have no concept of grapes, but imagine they must be purple. As a genius excelling in both culinary and magical arts, you've infused chive blossoms with the luscious magic hidden within amethysts...$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)3-minute 30-second Frost Aegis II$(li)10-minute Nourishment$(li)30-second Glacial Aura
This is absolutely grapes! They look identical and taste the same!$(br)Adding crushed ice to transform it into a smoothie naturally improves the texture.
